features.title: Normalize priority aliases
features.description: Normalize loose priority aliases into the canonical API priority values.
verification_steps: Run unit tests covering alias normalization

features.title: Summarize normalized work items
features.description: Aggregate normalized work items into a stable summary response.
verification_steps: Run unit and system tests covering summary output

features.title: Publish runnable example and delivery artifacts
features.description: Ship an example entrypoint and the supporting delivery artifacts for the change package.
verification_steps: Run example script and verify output shape
Confirm release notes and retrospective exist
